name: The KPIs
effect: Declare measurable success across all tracked dimensions. This card is considered aligned.

clauses.name: SELECTION CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If a metric trends unfavorably: It is removed from the dashboard.

clauses.name: REBASELINE OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If targets are missed: Targets are revised retroactively and the quarter is considered a win.

clauses.name: ATTRIBUTION PROTECTION
clauses.rule: If outcomes cannot be traced to tracked metrics: The metrics are considered leading indicators.

witness_quote: We're trending in the right direction.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: What happened to the other metrics?
